[Western Baltic] GERMAN NAV WARN 208/26
081100 UTC APR 26
GERMAN NAV WARN 208/26
WESTERN BALTIC. BIGHT OF MECKLENBURG.
GEOPHYSICAL SURVEYS CONDUCTED
BY MV 'MIRANDA' CS 'T7AD2'
AROUND PSN 54-14,0N 012-00E.
VESSEL TOWING MEASURING INSTRUMENTS ASTERN.
RESTRICTED MANOEVRABILITY DURING OPS.
BERTH OF 0,5 NAUTICAL MILE REQUESTED.
CANCEL NAVIGATIONAL WARNING NO. 207.
